description: Richard Brown, CTO of R3, discusses the alignment of the Corda ecosystem with the Solana network, emphasizing its scalability, vision, and ecosystem of developers. He highlights the importance of processing high transaction volumes with low fees and the long-term vision shared by both R3 and Solana.
topic_summary: In this talk, Richard Brown outlines the reasons for choosing Solana for the Corda ecosystem, focusing on its scalability [t=22:00], long-term vision [t=51:79], and the vibrant developer ecosystem [t=91:55].
